Class JasperHtmlExporter

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.AbstractJasperExporter
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.JasperHtmlExporter
All Implemented Interfaces:
JasperIExporter, JasperIHtmlExporter, Serializable
public class JasperHtmlExporter extends AbstractJasperExporter implements JasperIHtmlExporter

JasperHtmlExporter class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
